description: ServiceNow MCP server — 67 tools over the full REST surface, every auth method, flows, diagrams.
name: io.github.IvanBBaev/servicenow-mcp-ai

environmentVariables.description: Auth mode: basic | oauth | apikey | token | none. Auto-detected from the keys present if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: SN_AUTH

environmentVariables.description: Username for basic auth or the OAuth password grant.
environmentVariables.name: SN_USER

environmentVariables.description: Password for basic auth or the OAuth password grant.
environmentVariables.name: SN_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: ServiceNow API key, sent as the x-sn-apikey header (apikey auth).
environmentVariables.name: SN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Which tool packages to expose, e.g. core (default), all, or a comma-separated list.
environmentVariables.name: SN_TOOL_PACKAGES
